headline: Phased CLI pipeline that reconciles fest-declared progress against disk/git/memory/corpus evidence and emits ranked JSON ship-evidence artifacts.

capabilities.notes: Runs fest list, scores each festival vs disk/git/MEMORY evidence; writes festival_evidence.json.
Portfolio-wide ship-evidence audit across repos/GitHub/skills/Pre-Atlas internals; writes portfolio_evidence.json.
Cross-references ChatGPT memory_db conversations vs portfolio; emits discussed/shipped buckets.
Same recon over ~1000 Claude Code session .jsonl transcripts vs portfolio.
Phase 1. Subcommand seq in {chatgpt,cc,fs,all}; builds *_temporal.json and updates _progress.json ledger.
Phase 2 Seq 01. Groups portfolio items into topic clusters; writes clusters_v0.json (--v2 for v2 path).
Phase 2 Seq 02. Expands clusters with co-occurring corpus terms; writes clusters_v1.json.
Phase 2 Seq 03. Computes coverage/distinctness/FP-sample diagnostics; writes clusters_final.json.

capabilities.invoke: python build_era_matrix.py --era-label L --start YYYY-MM-DD --end YYYY-MM-DD --out PATH
capabilities.notes: Phase 3. Builds per-era cluster count matrix for a date window.
Phase 4. Joins ChatGPT idea / CC build / FS ship per strong-band item; writes ship_flow.json.
